events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: no service disconnect within sight of the condenser/heat pump is a **fail** — it's a life-safety/lockout-tagout violation (disconnect must be within sight per NEC 440.14, referenced alongside IMC/IRC M1401 and the mfr manual), high risk, and must be corrected before rough-in can be signed off.
